title: THSI Static Scientific Edge
description: Schema for a directed evidence edge in the THSI Static Scientific Evidence Graph. Every edge must trace to at least one source_id. Direct diagnostic inference (marker → psychological diagnosis) is forbidden.

edge_id.description: Unique slug identifier for this edge.

target_node.description: Target node (mechanism or intermediate construct; not a clinical diagnosis).

confidence_prior.description: Optional prior confidence label or numeric string for THSI weighting.

source_ids.description: One or more source_id values from the evidence registry.

context_requirements.description: Conditions under which this edge applies (population, timing, baseline, etc.).

forbidden_direct_inference.description: Explicit note of what must NOT be inferred from this edge alone.

examples.methodology_basis: HRV metrics vs autonomic balance literature
examples.main_finding_summary: Reduced HRV relative to baseline may reflect autonomic regulation shift.
examples.context_requirements: Requires baseline comparison and artifact control.
examples.forbidden_direct_inference: Must not infer depression_diagnosis or anxiety_diagnosis.
